rationale: The two `ensures` clauses give `abstractify_seq_of_cpackets_to_set_of_sht_packets(r_i@) == self_@.un_acked_messages(src@)` and `self_@.un_acked_messages(src@) == r_i@.map_values(|p| p@).to_set()` for each run; re-asserting all four instantiations on the shared witness `self_@.un_acked_messages(src@)` forces z3 to fire both `forall` triggers, after which transitivity plus `=~=` set extensionality lines up the abstract-set projection that the determinism predicate compares.
